title: Develop feeding plans for livestock
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Develop feeding plans for livestock demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine nutritional requirements for livestock

pcs.text: Determine nutritional value of pasture and feedstuffs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine nutritional value of pasture and feedstuffs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine nutritional value of pasture and feedstuffs.

pcs.text: Identify and assess livestock production status according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and assess livestock production status according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and assess livestock production status according to workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Determine essential requirements for livestock nutrition according to assessed livestock condition
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine essential requirements for livestock nutrition according to assessed livestock condition?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine essential requirements for livestock nutrition according to assessed livestock condition.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Determine nutritional requirements for livestock

elements.title: Assess pasture feed

pcs.text: Determine grazing management strategy to ensure the sustainable stocking capacity of pasture
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine grazing management strategy to ensure the sustainable stocking capacity of pasture?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine grazing management strategy to ensure the sustainable stocking capacity of pasture.

pcs.text: Estimate pasture for quantity and quality to ensure continual and consistent supply of nutrients to livestock
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Estimate pasture for quantity and quality to ensure continual and consistent supply of nutrients to livestock?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Estimate pasture for quantity and quality to ensure continual and consistent supply of nutrients to livestock.

pcs.text: Estimate and assess pasture intake according to identified nutritional requirements of livestock
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Estimate and assess pasture intake according to identified nutritional requirements of livestock?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Estimate and assess pasture intake according to identified nutritional requirements of livestock.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Assess pasture feed

elements.title: Determine supplementary feeding program

pcs.text: Determine economic basis to supplementary feeding according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine economic basis to supplementary feeding according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine economic basis to supplementary feeding according to workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Identify and determine types of supplementary feed for all classes of livestock
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and determine types of supplementary feed for all classes of livestock?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and determine types of supplementary feed for all classes of livestock.

pcs.text: Determine supplementary feeding program to fill the pasture shortfall for predicted pasture growth
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine supplementary feeding program to fill the pasture shortfall for predicted pasture growth?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine supplementary feeding program to fill the pasture shortfall for predicted pasture growth.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Determine supplementary feeding program

elements.title: Develop livestock feeding plan

pcs.text: Develop and review feeding plan to ensure it remains responsive to changing conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop and review feeding plan to ensure it remains responsive to changing conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop and review feeding plan to ensure it remains responsive to changing conditions.

pcs.text: Identify and implement feed conservation methods or fodder sources in preparation for abnormal conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and implement feed conservation methods or fodder sources in preparation for abnormal conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and implement feed conservation methods or fodder sources in preparation for abnormal conditions.

pcs.text: Select a system of feeding that supplies the appropriate amount of feed to the herd or flock to meet condition and growth needs, and workplace production requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select a system of feeding that supplies the appropriate amount of feed to the herd or flock to meet condition and growth needs, and workplace production requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select a system of feeding that supplies the appropriate amount of feed to the herd or flock to meet condition and growth needs, and workplace production requirements.

pcs.text: Prepare a feed budget according to the selected system of feeding
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare a feed budget according to the selected system of feeding?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare a feed budget according to the selected system of feeding.

pcs.text: Document data for assessment and effective management planning
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document data for assessment and effective management planning?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document data for assessment and effective management planning.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Develop livestock feeding plan
